name: Kopitiam Bukit Sentosa
tagline: Old-school charm meets freshly brewed magic
description: Nestled in the heart of Bukit Sentosa, this family-run kopitiam has been serving the community for over 20 years. Their signature white coffee is roasted on-site every morning, filling the entire lane with an irresistible aroma. Pull up a marble-topped chair, order a kaya toast set, and watch the neighbourhood come alive.

name: The Rawang Roast
tagline: Specialty beans, slow pour, fast friends
description: The Rawang Roast is the area's newest specialty coffee destination, tucked inside a beautifully restored shophouse. The baristas here are deeply passionate about their single-origin beans sourced from highland farms in Sabah and Pahang. Sit by the large open windows with your V60 pour-over and lose track of time completely.

name: Sentosa Garden Café
description: Hidden behind a lush garden wall, Sentosa Garden Café is a verdant retreat that feels miles away from the hustle of Rawang. Every corner is decorated with climbing pothos and hanging ferns, making it the most photogenic spot in the area. Their floral-infused lattes and homemade banana cake are must-tries on any visit.
